digest.component_or_area: autolander compose service on Gerrit box
propositions: Package the auto-lander loop as a new container image and add an autolander service to the existing compose stack, single-instance.
Enforce single-instance via a POSIX advisory flock on autolander.lock at the root of the state volume, not via the Swarm-only deploy.replicas key.
Declare the named volume gerrit_autolander as external and add its subdir autolander to SITE_SUBDIRS so config-check.sh check 5 passes.
Wire the willfarrell/autoheal sidecar with the Docker socket mounted read-write and label the autolander service autoheal=true.
State volume must persist the lockfile, heartbeat, emergency-stop sentinel, and recovery.json across container recreation.
Tests validate docker compose config and prove a second instance exits non-zero within 10s due to failed flock.
